name: sitidle
label: Sit Idle
_note: Hand-authored 2-key hold pose (no FBX source), added in commit 7a22e5993 for the /walk sit gesture. Not part of the Mixamo retarget pipeline — merged into manifest.json here so it stays reachable by AnimationManager.crossfadeTo('sitidle') instead of silently regressing to a dead gesture slot on the next animation build.
